title: Ensure getters and setters access the expected fields
description: Getters and setters provide a way to enforce encapsulation by providing public methods that give controlled access to private fields. However, in classes with multiple fields, it is not unusual that copy and paste is used to quickly create the needed getters and setters, which can result in the wrong field being accessed by a getter or setter.
recommendation: Review and correct the getters and setters to ensure they access the expected fields.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities due to unintended access to fields.

checks.message: Review and correct the getters and setters to ensure they access the expected fields.
